## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Are there workarounds today? Other apps that do this differently? -->

## Privacy check

DeCloud's core promise is that no data ever leaves the user's local network.
**Does this feature involve any of the following?** *(check all that apply)*

- [ ] Cloud storage / cloud sync
- [ ] Telemetry / analytics
- [ ] Account systems
- [ ] Third-party SDKs
- [ ] Network requests outside the local network

If you checked any box above, please understand the feature **will not be accepted**, even as opt-in. That isn't negotiable — it's the entire reason DeCloud exists.

## Anything else?
